Name: search_news_aggregate
SQL: WITH "_root.base" AS MATERIALIZED (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"("search" := $1) AS "_fn_search_news" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "public"."departments" f WHERE "_fn_search_news"."department_id" = f."id" AND f."budget" > $2::numeric AND f."id" = ANY($3::uuid[]))) SELECT json_build_object('aggregate', (SELECT json_build_object('count', COUNT(*)) FROM "_root.base"), 'nodes', (SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') FROM (SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."content" AS "content", "_root.r.department"."department" AS "department") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.department.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."departments" WHERE "_root.base"."department_id" = "id" AND "public"."departments"."id" = ANY($4::uuid[]) LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.department.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "department" FROM "_root.r.department.base") AS "_root.r.department" ON ('true')) AS "_root")) AS "search_news_aggregate"
